testimonial.title: Stories from our community
testimonial.t1Quote: The days of managing hundreds of applicants in Excel are over. With CASA, everything from status monitoring to mentor matching is done on one screen — admin time cut in half.
testimonial.t2Quote: I can review applicant documents and auto-generate assessment reports on one screen. The AI that organizes my comments into an official report is outstanding.
testimonial.t3Quote: I built a business plan in one day and applied mentor feedback right away. It used to take days — now I just say 'revise this' and AI handles it.

process.title: Start in 3 steps
process.subtitle: From signup to results — completely free
process.step1Desc: Quick signup with email. No credit card or payment info needed.
process.step2Desc: Pre-founders write ideas, founders upload business plans.
process.step3Desc: AI analyzes, evaluates, and creates documents. Review, revise, and you're done!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, all features are currently free. AI API costs are covered by the platform.
faq.q2: How do I register my institution?
faq.a2: Select 'Institution Manager' during signup and specify your institution. After system admin approval, you can start using CASA.
faq.a3: After mentoring is complete and an AI assessment report is generated, the institution manager reviews and approves payment. Actual disbursement follows the institution's internal process.
faq.a4: Yes. You can directly edit AI-generated documents, or instruct AI to 'revise section X' for targeted modifications.
faq.q5: Does it work for any type of startup idea?
faq.a5: Yes, you can input startup ideas and business plans from any field — IT, manufacturing, services, etc. The AI analyzes according to the relevant industry.
faq.q6: How can I view applicant status by institution?
faq.a6: The institution manager dashboard shows all applicants at a glance. Stage-by-stage progress from idea to deployment updates in real-time.
faq.a7: All comments and revision history are automatically recorded by round. When mentoring ends, AI generates a summary assessment report of the entire process.
faq.q8: Can I upload a business plan PDF?
faq.a8: Yes, in entrepreneur projects you can upload PDF files and text is automatically extracted. Supports up to 50MB, and you can manually edit the extracted text.
faq.a9: All data is encrypted with Row Level Security — only you can access it. Input data is never exposed externally or used as AI training data.
faq.q10: Can I use it in English?
faq.a10: Yes, Korean and English are supported. Switch in language settings, and AI generates documents in your selected language.
